sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_math (id INT, value1 INT, value2 INT, result INT);
INSERT INTO test_math (id, value1, value2, result) VALUES (1, 2, 3, 2 + 3);
UPDATE test_math SET result = value1 + value2 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, value1, value2, result FROM test_math WHERE result = 2 + 3;
CREATE TABLE test_advanced_math (id INT, value INT, incremented_value INT); INSERT INTO test_advanced_math (id, value, incremented_value) VALUES (1, 5, value + 1);
